jobs_lease_fields_ck.name: jobs_lease_fields_ck
jobs_lease_fields_ck.value: (`jobs`.`status` = 'leased' and `jobs`.`lease_owner_id` is not null and `jobs`.`lease_id` is not null and `jobs`.`lease_expires_at` is not null) or (`jobs`.`status` <> 'leased' and `jobs`.`lease_owner_id` is null and `jobs`.`lease_id` is null and `jobs`.`lease_expires_at` is null)

runs_safety_state_ck.name: runs_safety_state_ck
runs_safety_state_ck.value: `runs`.`deployment_authorized` = false and `runs`.`deployment_performed` = false and `runs`.`full_skill_coverage_proven` = false and `runs`.`client_compatibility_proven` = false
